diagnostics.name: null_scenario_negative_control
diagnostics.detail: Null scenario is reported as a diagnostic, not alpha.

diagnostics.name: planted_scenario_recovery
diagnostics.detail: Planted relation is an engineering sanity check only.

diagnostics.name: label_permutation
diagnostics.detail: Fixed-seed permutation degrades deterministic directional agreement.

diagnostics.name: timestamp_mutation
diagnostics.detail: Signals moved after decision time are excluded from eligible studies.

diagnostics.name: future_price_mutation
diagnostics.detail: Changing bars after the reaction window leaves earlier study hashes unchanged.

diagnostics.name: input_order_invariance
diagnostics.detail: Scenario and label hashes use sorted deterministic business keys.

diagnostics.name: current_clock_invariance
diagnostics.detail: No current wall-clock timestamp enters labels or metrics.

diagnostics.name: future_return_sentinel
diagnostics.detail: Import validator rejects future-return sentinel columns.

diagnostics.name: missing_data
diagnostics.detail: Missing bars produce unavailable labels with typed reasons.
